summary: 3D globe visualization project with World Controls panel. Moving Real/Hourly/Year buttons and time display from bottom-right panel into the Sun Effects section of the World Controls panel.
architectural_notes: 3D globe visualization with a World Controls panel containing a Sun Effects section
Bottom-right selected panel (Real, Hourly, Year buttons + time display) is being relocated into Sun Effects section

new_feature_requests.summary: Move Real/Hourly/Year buttons and time display from bottom-right panel into Sun Effects section of World Controls panel, removing original bottom-right panel

Move the Real, Hourly, and Year mode buttons along with their corresponding time display from the bottom-right floating panel (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]) into the Sun Effects section inside the World Controls panel (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]). The buttons and time display must be rendered as a cohesive sub-section within Sun Effects, preserving all existing functionality (mode switching, time display updates).
Remove the bottom-right floating panel (XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]) from the DOM entirely after its contents have been relocated to the Sun Effects section.
Preserve the existing UI layout and 3D globe unchanged. All other controls, panels, and the globe rendering must remain exactly as they are before this change.
